title: Directory-level architectural abstraction for lib/db
description: The lib/db directory is responsible for implementing DBSplitter interfaces for various data types, such as BigDecimal, Boolean, Date, Float, Integer, and Text. These splitters are used to split the data into manageable chunks for processing. The files in this directory collaborate by sharing the same package and importing necessary classes. The architectural role of this directory is to provide a centralized location for handling database-related splitters and to ensure that the splitters are implemented correctly and efficiently.

The lib/db directory is responsible for implementing DBSplitter interfaces for various data types, such as BigDecimal, Boolean, Date, Float, Integer, and Text. These splitters are used to split the data into manageable chunks for processing. The files in this directory collaborate by sharing the same package and importing necessary classes.
